description: Tenant AI training & regression: chat JSON (maintenance_ticket), maintenance-draft JSON, and parser edge cases. Re-run: python backend/apps/tenant_portal/fixtures/generate_tenant_ai_training_cases.py

cases.summary: Dripping mixer tap — ticket + plumbing draft.
cases.sample_transcript:
Tenant: The kitchen mixer tap won't stop dripping.
Assistant: Thanks — I'll note that for a plumber visit.
cases.sample_chat_assistant_raw: {"reply": "I've flagged a leaking kitchen tap for the maintenance team.", "conversation_title": "Kitchen tap leak", "maintenance_ticket": {"title": "Kitchen mixer tap dripping", "description": "Tenant reports continuous drip from kitchen mixer tap.", "priority": "medium"}}
cases.sample_draft_model_raw: {"title": "Kitchen mixer tap dripping", "description": "Continuous drip; tenant requests plumber.", "priority": "medium", "category": "plumbing"}

cases.sample_transcript:
Tenant: The toilet keeps running after flush.
Assistant: That's usually a faulty float or seal — worth logging.
cases.sample_chat_assistant_raw: {"reply": "Please log this so we can send someone to check the cistern.", "conversation_title": null, "maintenance_ticket": {"title": "Toilet cistern runs continuously", "description": "Water runs after flush; possible seal or float issue.", "priority": "medium"}}
cases.sample_draft_model_raw: {"title": "Toilet cistern running", "description": "Continuous water noise after flush.", "priority": "medium", "category": "plumbing"}

cases.sample_transcript:

Assistant: Turn off the stopcock if you can; this is urgent.

We're logging this as urgent.", "conversation_title": "Burst pipe", "maintenance_ticket": {"title": "Burst pipe under bathroom basin", "description": "Active water escape; tenant to isolate if possible.", "priority": "urgent"}}
cases.sample_draft_model_raw: {"title": "Burst pipe bathroom basin", "description": "Gushing water; stopcock advice given.", "priority": "urgent", "category": "plumbing"}

cases.sample_transcript:

Assistant: Do not use that socket. Logging urgent electrical.

cases.summary: Mentions maintenance in passing, no current issue.
cases.sample_transcript:

Assistant: For rent, see your lease escalation clause.
cases.sample_chat_assistant_raw: {"reply": "Rent increases are per lease terms.", "conversation_title": null, "maintenance_ticket": null}

cases.sample_transcript:
Tenant: Die kraan in die badkamer lek die hele nag.
Assistant: Ek sal dit vir loodgieter aanmeld.

Tenant: No power in kitchen plugs maar bedroom is fine.
Assistant: Likely circuit issue — logging electrician.

Tenant: The bedroom aircon runs but blows warm.
Assistant: I'll log HVAC service.

Tenant: Bedroom window latch broken — won't stay shut.
Assistant: Logging carpentry/glazing.

Tenant: Black mould on bathroom ceiling corners.
Assistant: Ventilation + treatment job.

Tenant: Upstairs stomping at 2am.
Assistant: That's a neighbor conduct issue — contact estate manager.

Tenant: I lost my keys — need lock change.
Assistant: Logging locksmith for security.

Tenant: Garage motor remote not working.
Assistant: Battery or motor — logging.

Tenant: Smoke alarm chirps every minute.
Assistant: Likely battery — still log check.

Tenant: Back fence panel blew down in wind.
Assistant: Estate perimeter repair.

Tenant: Pool pump grinding noise all day.
Assistant: Logging estate maintenance.

Tenant: Lift stuck between floors with me inside — I'm out now.
Assistant: Escalate to body corporate urgently.

Tenant: Balcony railing moves when leaned on.
Assistant: Safety issue — high priority.

Tenant: Kitchen extractor fan dead.
Assistant: Appliance/electrical check.

Tenant: Shower pressure dropped to a trickle.
Assistant: Possible blockage or municipal — log inspection.

Tenant: Kitchen floor tile cracked and sharp edge.
Assistant: Trip hazard — medium priority.

Tenant: Can't hear visitors on intercom.
Assistant: Log access comms repair.

Tenant: Mailbox door fell off.
Assistant: Minor — logging.

Tenant: Stairwell light bulb out — dark at night.
Assistant: Common area — log.

Tenant: Gas geyser pilot won't stay lit.
Assistant: Gas technician required.

Tenant: Can landlord increase mid-lease?
Assistant: General info only — not legal advice.

Tenant: Should I go to Rental Housing Tribunal?
Assistant: For disputes that's an option — suggest qualified advice.

Tenant: Can I get a cat?
Assistant: Check lease pet clause and agent approval.

Tenant: Someone scratched my car in the bay — CCTV?
Assistant: Estate security query — not a unit repair ticket.

Tenant: Water dripping from our ceiling — flat above.
Assistant: Log leak + possible common pipe issue.

Tenant: Do I need professional clean?
Assistant: Per lease handover clause.

Tenant: Prepaid meter shows error E04.
Assistant: Municipality or landlord meter contractor.

Tenant: Tap water smells earthy this week.
Assistant: Could be estate borehole — log water quality check.

Tenant: Bedroom ceiling fan wobbles badly on high speed.
Assistant: Safety risk — log to secure or replace.

Tenant: Gutters overflow in heavy rain onto patio.
Assistant: Blocked downpipe likely — log.

Tenant: Estate pedestrian gate scrapes ground when opening.
Assistant: Log estate maintenance.

Tenant: Balcony doesn't drain after rain — puddles for days.
Assistant: Clear drain outlet — log.

Tenant: Medicine cabinet pulling off wall.
Assistant: Re-secure — medium priority.

Tenant: Underfloor heating not warming lounge tiles.
Assistant: Electrician/UFH specialist.

Tenant: Solar geyser circulation pump grinding.
Assistant: Log plumber/solar tech.

Tenant: Large crack appeared in rear boundary wall after rains.
Assistant: Structural inspection — log.

Tenant: Corrugated sheet on carport lifting in wind.
Assistant: Urgent secure — safety.

Tenant: Sewer smell near manhole in garden.
Assistant: Possible septic/drainage — log urgent if strong.

Tenant: Perimeter fence clicks constantly at night.
Assistant: Estate security electrics.

Tenant: Patio sliding door jumps off track.
Assistant: Hardware repair — log.

Tenant: Dripping through skylight in stairwell when it rains.
Assistant: Seal or replace — roof.

Tenant: Outdoor heat pump shows E3 and stops.
Assistant: HVAC technician.

Tenant: Mud tubes on garage wall — worried about termites.
Assistant: Pest inspection urgent.

Tenant: Birds nesting in bathroom vent outlet.
Assistant: Clear humanely + mesh — log.

Tenant: Basement sump pump alarm won't stop.
Assistant: If flooding risk — urgent.

Tenant: All LED downlights flicker together.
Assistant: Possible neutral fault — urgent electrical.

Tenant: Does landlord insure my contents?
Assistant: Usually tenant contents are separate — check lease.

Tenant: Can I Airbnb my spare room?
Assistant: Lease/subletting clause — ask agent.

Tenant: Renovation noise from neighbor unit after 8pm.
Assistant: Body corporate rules / estate manager.

Tenant: Got fined for parking in visitor bay.
Assistant: Estate office — not a repair ticket.

Tenant: What stage is loadshedding today?
Assistant: Check Eskom/municipality app — not property repair.

Tenant: No water in whole street — neighbors too.
Assistant: Likely municipal outage — check city alerts.

Tenant: I locked keys inside — need access.
Assistant: Locksmith/estate security — may be billable.

Tenant: Bathroom ceiling paint peeling from steam.
Assistant: Ventilation + repaint — log.

Tenant: Built-in cupboard rail snapped under weight.
Assistant: Carpentry repair.

Tenant: Spa bath jets very weak.
Assistant: Pump or blockage — log.

Tenant: Steam shower shows error and won't start.
Assistant: Specialist appliance.

Tenant: Estate water pump cycles every minute — noisy at night.
Assistant: Log estate infrastructure.

Tenant: Copper pipes stripped from outdoor unit overnight.
Assistant: Crime + insurance — urgent security repair.

Tenant: Graffiti appeared on passage wall near my door.
Assistant: Estate cleanup — log.
